title: dactylorhiza kerryensis var. occidentalis
intro: Dactylorhiza kerryensis var. occidentalis, also known as the Kerry Marsh Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid that is native to Ireland and the UK. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza kerryensis var. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried root powders, which can be used to create teas, syrups, and other medicinal products.
